Pipistrel Alpha Microlight 525 kg

11 Pipistrel Alpha

The Alpha Trainer combines performance and efficiency making it the perfect flight training aircraft. Through modern aerodynamic design and high-tech manufacturing, the Alpha Trainer provides superb performance and flight characteristics with low operating costs thanks to its fuel-efficiencies. The Alpha Trainer comes equipped with all the essential features expected for flight training, including a strong, durable undercarriage, and gentle flight characteristics. Suitable for both entry-level flight training and experienced aviators, the Alpha Trainer offers a quiet, relaxing cabin with easy access and is a comfortable learning environment for students. Operated throughout the world in some of the harshest conditions, the Alpha Trainer is a trusted and proven trainer, backed by Pipistrel’s service and support network.

POA
Views: 154 Last Refresh: 13-Apr-26
View

4 Pipistrel Alpha Trainer

Own a Pipistrel Alpha Trainer for £28,000! Fly for just £60/hour (fuel & maintenance included). This fully equipped aircraft is perfect for UK/European adventures & training. Low monthly payments (£120) cover hangarage & insurance. Conversion training available. Based at Damyns Hall Aerodrome. Come and Test fly the Alpha. Call 07540 899 690.

16 Comco Ikarus C42C - FB100 2023

**BIG SPEC 2023 Ikarus C42C - FB100 - £99,950 ono** Immaculate, high-spec Ikarus C42C FB100 Charlie with only 530 hours. Always hangered at Manchester Barton. Features Rotax 912 (100hp), soft start, Helix prop, lightest BRS parachute. Equipped with Kanardia EFIS & hybrid instruments, Trig ADS-B Out transponder & radio, Pilot Aware Rosetta FX, Beringer brakes, electric flaps. Boasts LED lighting, undercarriage fairings, sun visors & ample cockpit storage. Meticulously maintained, no missed services, C of C parts only. Ideal for flight school, syndicate upgrade or discerning owner-operator. BMAA permit. No damage history.

£99,995 ONO

Tiger Moth For Sale

9 DH82A 1942

For sale: a 1942 DH82A Tiger Moth (G-ALNA) for £80,000. Key features include a Gipsy Major 1 engine with 606 hours since overhaul, new Ceconite 102 fabric on wings and tail (2019), and an Icom 8.33 radio. Airframe hours are 7650. The aircraft has a current Certificate of Airworthiness until 27/3/25 and is hangared at Derby Airfield. Empty weight 1243 lbs, MTW 1825 lbs. Conventional instruments.

£80,000

5 Piper PA28-140 Cherokee 1967

Reduced for quick sale. PA28-140 Cherokee with dual Garmin G5, GNS 430, upgraded transponder and refurbished interior. Approx £35k avionics spend. Custom all-black scheme. Ex-flying school, rigorous maintenance, no deferred defects. Based Blackpool (EGNH). Turn-key ready.

£56,995

Miles M38 Messenger 2A for sale

10 M38 2A 1946

Offered for sale is a rare Miles M38 Messenger 2A, one of only six believed to be flying. This 1946 British-made aircraft seats four and is capable of operating from short airstrips while cruising at 100 knots. It has a continuous history with logbooks dating back to its first flights. The aircraft underwent a complete overhaul and military Mk4 appearance conversion. Notably, it was associated with Field Marshal Montgomery. A large spares package and full covers are included. Priced at £75,000.

£75,000
Views: 1008 Last Refresh: 10-Apr-26
View

Aeronca Chief - 1/4 share, East Sussex

6 Aeronca Aeronca Chief 11BC

The Chief is a delight to fly. It has been restored to a high standard and flies beautifully, an excellent example of its type. I am building an RV6 so the plane is not being flown enough, and now needs a bigger group to enjoy it and maintain it. The field is in a beautiful part of East Sussex in the Downs, easy to get to and home a small group of friendly flyers.

£8,000 ONO

Quantum 15 Rotax 582 Failed Betts Test

7 P&M Quantum 15 582 1996

For sale: a 1996 P&M Quantum 15 582 trike with 836 airframe hours and 532 engine hours. Priced at £1500 ONO, it features a wing that failed the Betts test, potentially suitable for TE repair. It includes OEM training bars, a spare prop blade, strobes, electric/pull start, and a refurbished panel (2020) with iPad and Icom radio mounts. A Flylight touring screen (not fitted) and uprated seat frame are included. The trike is in good condition for its age, starts well, and runs smoothly. Located in Westonzoyland, FaceTime walkarounds are welcomed.

£1,500 ONO

Light Aircraft – Services (Click to view all) listings

HOUR BUILDING FLYING GROUPS AD-HOC RENTAL 17 AIRCRAFT FLEET AND GROWING. CHEAPEST PRICES!!!

8

This advert promotes a multifaceted aviation group offering three tailored flying options: easy aircraft rental (ad-hoc, hour building, lease), North Weald Flying Group (subscription-based, affordable), and VT Aviators (subscription-based, premium aircraft). The easy rental option features a diverse fleet (C152s, C172s, PA-28s) with modern avionics. North Weald offers a larger fleet at a lower cost, while VT Aviators provides access to advanced, glass cockpit aircraft and a Piper Saratoga for long-range flights. All options include access to a VIP lounge and CAMO maintenance. A growing fleet of 17 aircraft.

3 ACS Products Co. A-510-2

Key Features & Description: • Design & Construction: The switch housing is machined from billet aluminum, making it 25% lighter than previous models. • Functionality: Provides "ON" and "OFF" electrical control for both magnetos (Left, Right, Both) and includes a starter position. • Installation: Designed for rear panel mounting in a 7/8” diameter hole. • Performance: Features positive, smooth action between positions for reliable magneto checks. • Compatibility: Often used with electronic ignitions.

Your Trusted Aviation Marketplace Since 1999

AFORS has been at the forefront of the independent aviation community for twenty-seven years, connecting the entire global flight ecosystem. Whether you are a seasoned pilot upgrading your wings, a student searching for the perfect aircraft, a dedicated flight instructor, an airfield owner offering hangarage, or an industry-leading manufacturer, AFORS is your platform.

Use our advanced search to explore thousands of listings, including complete airframes, zero-timed engines, specialised avionics, and aviation real estate. We have many competitors, but none can match our vision. Written by a pilot (Captain Afors) who understands the market, this platform is built for professionals and enthusiasts alike. We are bespoke, independent, 100% honourable, 100% ethical, and dedicated to keeping the aviation community flying. Forget the scrapers, copycats and other bad actors, come straight to the source here, at AFORS.

AFORS

Aircraft For Sale

Afors is a dedicated aviation marketplace for new and used aircraft, helping both private and commercial aviation. Online since 1999, it has passionately evolved since then and has become the go-to place for listing and searching for a wide range of aircraft, from light aircraft and microlights to helicopters and larger planes.

AFORS also features listings for aircraft parts, engines, avionics, hangarage, and every other aviation services and items. Serving the UK, European and Global markets.
